title: City Lights
caption: The skyline looked beautiful that night, but my favorite view was still you.

title: Neon Bloom
caption: Even the brightest places feel softer when they get to hold your light.

title: Yellow Umbrella
caption: You have a quiet way of turning simple moments into something worth keeping.

title: After Dark
caption: You made a playful little night feel like one more reason to celebrate you.

title: Us, Quietly
caption: One of my favorite things about this life is getting to stand close to you in it.

title: Warm Evenings
caption: That night you looked like comfort, and somehow that made you even more beautiful.

title: Shy Smile
caption: The smallest gestures from you always stay with me longer than they should.

title: Softest Light
caption: Some people wear pretty things. You make prettiness feel gentle just by being there.

title: Table For Two
caption: Even the simplest dates feel special because they are yours with me.

title: Garden Promise
caption: If I could choose one thing for your new year, it would be more days like this, hand in hand.

title: Keep Walking
caption: I hope this birthday year leads you to every beautiful thing you deserve.

title: Close To You
caption: No matter how crowded life gets, being near you still feels like the quietest place I know.

title: Sea Light
caption: On your birthday and every day after, I hope life feels as open and beautiful as this sky.

title: Blue Night
caption: I love your playful side; it makes every ordinary night feel a little more magical.

title: Favorite Table
caption: Happy birthday to the girl who can turn dinner, laughter, and a seat across from me into a memory.

title: Little Reflection
caption: Even in the smallest frame, you leave a kind of joy that fills the whole room.
